message.lifecycle.postload.moretasks: Some loading tasks will continue later.
message.lifecycle.unload.finish: Unload completed. Thank you for using UniversalPluginUpdater!
message.command.help: UniversalPluginUpdater provides plugin management and information lookup features.
It is similar to APT tools (like apt and apt-get),
and enables options more suitable for interactive by default.
/upu update - update list of available plugins
/upu download - download existing plugins' newer version by downloading
/upu upgrade - upgrade existing plugins by downloading/installing newer version
See docs for more information about the available commands.
Preferences can be configured through the config file.
This UPU has NO Super Cow Powers.

message.command.repo.help: /upu repo update - Check update configurations from remote repository
/upu repo list [--available|--updatable] - View available update configuration list
/upu repo get [all|PluginID...] - Get and save remote update configurations
message.command.repo.get.start: &7Fetching plugin update configurations from remote repository...
message.command.repo.get.none: No accessible update configurations. Please check available configurations using "/upu repo update" first.
message.command.repo.get.summary: Fetched {0} plugin update configurations, {1} failed, {2} skipped. Files have been saved to the channels folder.
message.command.repo.get.error.no-argume: &cAt least one plugin ID must be provided as a parameter.
message.command.repo.update.start: &7Checking plugin update configurations from remote repository...
message.command.repo.update.summary: {0} plugin(s) have available configurations, where {1} plugins have updates. {2} plugins are up to date, skipped {3} invalid plugin(s).
message.command.repo.update.next: Use "/upu repo list --available" to view available configurations. Use "/upu repo get" to get configurations.
